macro.title: Monthly Payments Tick Up For First Time in 6 Months As Mortgage Rates, Home Prices Jump
macro.what: The Iran war is a major factor pushing up mortgage rates
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.

housing.title: Rhode Island targets housing supply with three reform bills
housing.what: Rhode Island could become another state that allows faith-based organizations to build affordable housing on land they own without rezoning
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.
